events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today. He was born on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Drummer legend
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young today! We're celebrating the one and only Ringo Starr. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today. He was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar hero
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to rock royalty, Brian May! What's the ultimate Queen riff that comes to mind when you think of the guitar maestro?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today. He was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll icon
angles.copy: Eighty-three years of pure rock 'n' roll energy! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: Music TV revolution
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed music forever! Remember the first video ever played? 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles. Did it, though?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Twenty-two years ago today, Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe', featuring classics like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Britpop masterpiece
angles.copy: Twenty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'! An album that defined a generation. What's your go-to track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: Fifty-seven years ago today, the legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair began in Bethel, New York, becoming a cornerstone of counterculture history.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. If you could have been there, which artist would you have seen?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death (1977)
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, passed away at the age of 42. He would have been 91 this year, born on January 8, 1935.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the one and only Elvis Presley, who left us 49 years ago today. His music still reigns supreme. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death (1970)
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who died on September 18, 1970, aged 27. He would have been 84 this year, born on November 27, 1942.

angles.name: Guitar God tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 this year. His guitar work changed everything. What's his most iconic track for you?

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: Fifty-seven years ago today, The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road', featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic album cover
angles.copy: It's been 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road' and that unforgettable album cover. What's your top track from this masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today. She was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders legend
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! An absolute icon of rock. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman and Britpop icon Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today. He was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Mad for it
angles.copy: Fifty-four years young for the one and only Liam Gallagher! The voice of a generation. What's your essential Oasis anthem?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1971)
events.blurb: Fifty-five years ago today, John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine', a song that continues to inspire.

angles.name: Timeless message
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A powerful message that resonates as much today as it did then. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Twenty-five years ago today, Apple introduced the first iPod, revolutionising how we listen to music on the go.

angles.name: Music in your pocket
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? Twenty-five years ago, Apple changed everything, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'. How many did you fill yours with?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the first 007 film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Favourite Bond moment
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme tunes, what's your ultimate 007 moment or song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles legend John Lennon, who was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Lennon's legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Lennon lyric?
